notes: Trade association for underwriters operating in the Lloyd's of London insurance market. Publishes the LMA model clauses (LMA-numbered wordings) including the well-known cyber and cyber-war exclusion clauses (LMA5400-series) used in major insurance and reinsurance contracts. Members-only / paid.

data.notes: Members-only / paid. Includes the LMA5400-series cyber and cyber-war exclusion wordings widely used in cyber insurance and reinsurance.
